gaps.description: Single-file architecture: src/index.ts is 978 lines — approaching the 1000-line refactor trigger documented at line 22. Not yet violated but close to threshold.

Pipe error propagation: architecture says 'if left command fails, right command receives empty stdin (short-circuit behavior)' — implementation short-circuits on error output from left segment (lines 172-175). Behavior is documented in Pipe Error Short-Circuit section but test expectations may conflict.
Constructor only accepts (fs) parameter, but some tests pass { readOnly: true } as second arg — silently ignored. The readOnly property is read from fs.readOnly, not from constructor options.
grep streaming fallback documented in architecture but implementation also has case-insensitive multi-file bypass path that manually reads files — not documented in performance considerations.
mkdir fallback workaround (write path+'/.keep') IS implemented in mkdirOne()
